overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist exploring a sunlit Islamic palace courtyard with a central fountain, then entering the building through ornate archways and corridors, eventually reaching an interior bath house with a large pool. The footage showcases detailed historic Middle Eastern architecture with decorative tilework, columns, and courtyards.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit palace courtyard with central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the courtyard path beside the central fountain, observing the palace architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near the fountain edge
robed figure walking ahead toward the palace entrance

entered.detail: multi-tiered stone fountain with water basins in the courtyard center
row of stone arches with columns forming the courtyard perimeter
tall palm trees rising behind the fountain near the palace facade
ornate two-story building facade with arched windows and decorative stonework

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit palace courtyard with a large central fountain. The hooded protagonist walks along the paved path beside the fountain, passing potted flowers and palm trees. The stone arcade of the palace forms the backdrop, with a few robed NPCs standing or walking in the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and palace entrance stairs

events.description: character ascends stone stairs and enters the covered palace walkway
moving from bright sunlight into shaded interior corridor with dappled light

agents.ego_description: ascending stone stairs and entering the palace interior through ornate archways, passing under vine-covered pergolas

notable_agents.action: seated musician playing a stringed instrument on a wooden bench
palace guard in dark robes standing near the entrance doorway

entered.detail: wooden pergola structure covered in green vines providing partial shade
wide stone steps leading up to the palace entrance
green fabric canopy over a market stall with goods displayed
stone column with colorful geometric tile patterns at its base

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard into a semi-covered area, ascending stone stairs toward the palace entrance. Vine-covered pergolas provide partial shade as the lighting shifts from bright sun to dappled shade. Decorative columns with colorful tiles line the walkway, and a musician plays on a bench to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace interior corridors with decorated columns and carpets

events.description: entering deeper interior rooms with ornate tilework on columns and walls
passing wall-mounted burning torches that cast flickering light on the carpets

agents.ego_description: navigating through carpeted hallways with decorated columns, passing wooden screens and storage areas

notable_agents.action: servant in green robes carrying a candle through the corridor
seated figure working at a wooden table near a column

entered.detail: carved wooden screen with geometric patterns dividing the space
ornate red and green patterned rugs covering the stone floor
wall-mounted torch with visible flame providing warm illumination
large woven baskets stacked near the walls containing goods

segments.scene_description: Inside the palace, the character walks through carpeted corridors illuminated by burning torches. Decorated columns with colorful geometric tile patterns line the halls, and wooden lattice screens divide the spaces. The environment is dimmer and more enclosed, with NPCs engaged in various activities like carrying candles or working at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior bath house with large rectangular pool

events.description: entering the bath chamber through lattice doors, revealing a large rectangular pool
approaching the pool edge where steam rises from the water surface

agents.ego_description: entering the bath house and approaching the central pool, observing the bathing area

notable_agents.action: bather in red robes sitting at the edge of the pool with feet in water
figure entering through the far arched doorway of the bath chamber

entered.detail: large rectangular pool with stepped edges filled with water
circular fountain structure in the center of the bath pool
visible steam rising from the warm water surface
open carved wooden doors with geometric patterns at the entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a grand bath house interior with a large rectangular pool as the centerpiece. The character enters through lattice doors and approaches the pool edge, where steam rises from the water. A bather sits at the pool's edge, and the space features marble floors and decorative wall tiles, with light streaming in from a distant doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open palace courtyard into the dim, atmospheric depths of a grand bath house. It begins in the brilliant sunlight beside a large central fountain, following the hooded protagonist past palm trees and robed figures along a paved path. As the character ascends stone stairs, the scene shifts from open light to dappled shade beneath vine-covered pergolas and colorful tiled columns. The environment then transitions into the enclosed interior of the palace, moving through carpeted corridors illuminated by flickering torches and divided by wooden lattice screens. Finally, the camera passes through lattice doors to reveal a steaming bath house, where the dim halls open up to a large rectangular pool surrounded by marble floors and decorative wall tiles.
